root_text.sn26.6:1.4: yo dhammasaññāya uppādo ṭhiti abhinibbatti pātubhāvo, dukkhasseso uppādo, rogānaṁ ṭhiti, jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo.
root_text.sn26.6:1.5: Yo ca kho, bhikkhave, rūpasaññāya nirodho …pe…
root_text.sn26.6:1.7: yo dhammasaññāya nirodho vūpasamo atthaṅgamo, dukkhasseso nirodho, rogānaṁ vūpasamo, jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo”ti.

translation_text.sn26.6:1.2: “Mendicants, the arising of perception of sights …
translation_text.sn26.6:1.4: perception of ideas … is the manifestation of old age and death.
translation_text.sn26.6:1.5: The cessation of perception of sights …
translation_text.sn26.6:1.7: perception of ideas … is the disappearance of old age and death.”
